faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our services

q1.question: How does the Miami mailbox work?
q1.answer: We assign you an address at our Miami warehouse. You can use this address to receive your purchases from any store in the United States. Once they arrive, we consolidate and ship them to Chile or Paraguay.

q2.question: How long does shipping from USA take?
q2.answer: Air shipments from Miami to Chile or Paraguay take between 5 to 10 business days, depending on volume and selected shipping method. We dispatch weekly.

q3.question: Can I track my package?
q3.answer: Yes, we provide real-time tracking from the moment your package arrives at our warehouse until delivery at your address. You will receive updates via WhatsApp or email.

q4.question: What products are prohibited?
q4.answer: Hazardous materials, weapons, illegal substances, and perishable products cannot be shipped. For the complete list, contact us directly or check the customs regulations of your destination country.

q5.question: How do imports from China work?
q5.answer: We manage the entire process: from coordinating with the Chinese supplier, cargo consolidation, sea or air transport, customs procedures, and final delivery in Chile or Paraguay.

q6.question: What does the personal shopping service include?
q6.answer: We search for the product you need, verify the seller, make the purchase on your behalf, inspect quality, and ship it directly to your address. You just choose and we do the rest.

q7.question: How are shipping costs calculated?
q7.answer: Costs are calculated based on the weight and dimensions of the package. We consolidate your purchases to reduce volume and optimize pricing. Request a quote for an exact price.

q8.question: Do you handle customs procedures?
q8.answer: Yes, we take care of all documentation and customs management needed for your products to enter Chile or Paraguay without issues.

footer.description: International shipping service from the United States and China to Chile and Paraguay. Trust, speed, and transparency.

usaPage.title: Shipping from the United States
usaPage.subtitle: Your personal mailbox in Miami for shopping across the US
usaPage.intro: Shop on Amazon, eBay, Walmart, and any online store in the United States. We receive your packages at our Miami warehouse, consolidate them, and ship them to Chile or Paraguay with complete security.

address.title: Miami Address
address.description: Get an exclusive address at our Miami warehouse for all your online purchases.

consolidation.title: Smart Consolidation
consolidation.description: We group all your packages into a single shipment to reduce transportation costs.

photos.title: Photo Documentation
photos.description: Receive photos of each package upon arrival at the warehouse to verify contents and condition.

weekly.title: Weekly Dispatches
weekly.description: We send consolidated shipments every week to ensure consistent delivery times.

returns.title: Return Management
returns.description: If a product does not meet your expectations, we handle the return within the United States.

noLimits.title: No Weight Limits
noLimits.description: We ship packages of any size and weight. From documents to large appliances.

process.title: Step by Step Process
steps: Sign up and get your Miami address
Shop at your favorite US store and use our address
We notify you when it arrives at the warehouse with photos
We consolidate your packages to optimize costs
We dispatch weekly shipments to Chile or Paraguay
Receive at your doorstep with full tracking

chinaPage.title: Imports from China
chinaPage.subtitle: Comprehensive solution for businesses importing from Asia
chinaPage.intro: We facilitate the entire import process from China for businesses in Chile and Paraguay. From supplier negotiation to delivery at your warehouse, we manage every detail so your business grows without complications.

sourcing.title: Supplier Sourcing
sourcing.description: We help you find the best verified and reliable suppliers in China.

negotiation.title: Price Negotiation
negotiation.description: We negotiate on your behalf to get the best prices and purchase conditions.

quality.title: Quality Control
quality.description: We inspect products before shipping to ensure they meet your specifications.

logistics.title: International Logistics
logistics.description: We manage sea or air transport according to your time and budget needs.

customs.title: Customs Clearance
customs.description: All documentation and customs procedures handled by our specialized team.

delivery.title: Destination Delivery
delivery.description: We coordinate final delivery to your warehouse or distribution point in Chile or Paraguay.

personalPage.title: Personal Shopping
personalPage.subtitle: We buy for you in the United States and China
personalPage.intro: Do not have an international credit card? The seller does not ship to your country? Do not worry. We make the purchase on your behalf, verify the product, and ship it directly to your address in Chile or Paraguay.

noCard.title: No International Card Needed
noCard.description: You do not need an international credit card. We make the purchase for you.

anyStore.description: We buy from Amazon, eBay, Best Buy, Alibaba, and any online or physical store.

verification.description: We review each product before shipping to make sure it matches your order.

advice.title: Expert Advice
advice.description: We guide you on the best purchase options, prices, and available alternatives.

guarantee.description: If the product is not what you expected, we manage the exchange or return.
